frame_analyses.description: The tools and suture material are visible, but no interaction has started.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Setup is complete and ready for the task to begin.

frame_analyses.description: Needle is being grasped and aligned for loading.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Needle is held securely, exhibiting proper alignment.

frame_analyses.description: The suture is being placed through the marked points on the Penrose drain.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Suture is aligned with minimal deviation from the marks.

frame_analyses.description: The first throw of the knot is being completed.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Suture material is being handled with care to avoid slipping.

frame_analyses.description: The trainee is preparing to switch hands for the second throw.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Switching of hands is observed, maintaining proper suture tension.

frame_analyses.description: The third and final throw is being performed.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final throw tightens the knot without visible gaps.

frame_analyses.description: Cutting the excess suture ends to complete the task.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Precision in cutting ensures suture ends are close to the knot.

frame_analyses.description: Both suture ends have been cut, completing the task.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completed without avulsion or major slips evident.

knot_assessments.notes: First throw with double wrap is secure with proper tension.
Final throw properly secures the knot.

drain_assessment.assessment_note: The slit is completely closed without gaps.

technique_summary: The trainee demonstrated precise technique and secure knot tying with minimal suture deviation, completing the task efficiently.
improvement_suggestions: Continue refining suture placement to further reduce deviation.
Practice maintaining consistent suture tension during hand switches.
strengths: Excellent handling of needle and instruments.
Secure and stable knot without visible slipping.
